message:
fix(dashboard): use loaded config for alerts instead of defaults

Use the actual config settings for alert generation instead of
hardcoded defaults.

- fetchAlertsCmd() now checks if m.cfg is set (from ConfigReloadMsg)
- If config available, converts to alerts.Config via ToConfigAlerts()
- Falls back to alerts.DefaultConfig() if config not yet loaded
- Enables user-configured alert thresholds to take effect in dashboard

This connects the alerts panel to the user's [alerts] config section.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
